teachers.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
teachers.subject: Data Science & Analytics
teachers.bio: PhD in Computer Science with 10+ years of experience in data analytics and machine learning. Published researcher and industry consultant.

teachers.name: Prof. Michael Chen
teachers.subject: Machine Learning & AI
teachers.bio: Former Google AI researcher with expertise in deep learning and neural networks. Passionate about teaching AI to students.

teachers.name: Dr. Emily Rodriguez

teachers.bio: PhD in Research Methods with 15+ years of experience guiding graduate students through thesis and dissertation writing.

services.name: Python for Data Science
services.description: Master Python programming for data analysis, visualization, and machine learning. Learn pandas, numpy, matplotlib, and scikit-learn with real-world projects.
services.features: ["Python Fundamentals for Data Analysis", "NumPy for Numerical Computing", "Pandas for Data Manipulation", "Matplotlib & Seaborn for Visualization", "Introduction to Machine Learning with scikit-learn", "Real-world Projects and Case Studies"]

services.name: MATLAB for Data Analytics
services.description: Learn MATLAB for numerical computing, data analysis, scientific computing, and advanced mathematical modeling for engineering and research.
services.features: ["MATLAB Fundamentals and Syntax", "Matrix Operations and Linear Algebra", "Data Visualization and Plotting", "Signal Processing and Analysis", "Simulink for System Modeling", "MATLAB for Research Applications"]

services.name: R for Statistical Analysis
services.description: Master R programming for statistical analysis, data visualization, and advanced analytics. Ideal for statisticians, researchers, and data scientists.
services.features: ["R Programming Fundamentals", "Data Import and Cleaning with dplyr", "Statistical Modeling and Hypothesis Testing", "Data Visualization with ggplot2", "Machine Learning with caret", "R Markdown for Reproducible Research"]

services.name: SQL for Database Management
services.description: Master SQL for database management, complex queries, data extraction, and optimization. Essential for data analysts and database administrators.
services.features: ["SQL Fundamentals and Query Writing", "JOINs and Subqueries", "Aggregation and Grouping", "Window Functions and CTEs", "Database Design and Normalization", "Performance Optimization and Indexing"]

services.name: Power BI for Business Intelligence
services.description: Master Power BI for data visualization, dashboards, and business intelligence. Learn to transform data into actionable insights.
services.features: ["Power BI Desktop Fundamentals", "Data Transformation with Power Query", "DAX Formulas and Calculations", "Interactive Dashboards and Reports", "Data Modeling and Relationships", "Publishing and Sharing Insights"]

services.name: Tableau for Data Visualization
services.description: Master Tableau for creating stunning data visualizations, interactive dashboards, and business intelligence reports.
services.features: ["Tableau Desktop Fundamentals", "Data Connection and Preparation", "Creating Charts and Visualizations", "Interactive Dashboards", "Calculations and Parameters", "Storytelling with Data"]

services.name: Thesis Writing Workshop
services.description: Comprehensive workshop on academic thesis writing, structure, formatting, and publication strategies for graduate students.
services.features: ["Thesis Structure and Organization", "Literature Review Techniques", "Methodology Development", "Data Analysis and Interpretation", "Writing and Editing Strategies", "Publication and Defense Preparation"]

services.name: Research Methodology Mastery
services.description: Master qualitative and quantitative research methods for academic and professional research projects. Essential for PhD and Masters students.
services.features: ["Research Design and Planning", "Qualitative Research Methods", "Quantitative Research Methods", "Mixed Methods Approaches", "Sampling and Data Collection", "Ethical Considerations in Research"]

services.name: Literature Review Excellence
services.description: Learn systematic literature review techniques, citation management, and critical analysis of academic sources for comprehensive research.
services.features: ["Systematic Literature Review Process", "Database Search Strategies", "Citation Management (EndNote, Zotero)", "Critical Analysis of Sources", "Synthesis and Gap Identification", "Writing the Literature Review Chapter"]

services.name: Academic Publishing Success
services.description: Learn how to publish in peer-reviewed journals, from manuscript preparation to submission, revision, and final publication.
services.features: ["Journal Selection Strategies", "Manuscript Preparation and Formatting", "Peer Review Process Navigation", "Responding to Reviewer Comments", "Open Access Publishing", "Research Impact Metrics"]

services.name: AI & Machine Learning
services.description: Master cutting-edge AI technologies including prompt engineering, generative AI, deep learning, and MLOps.
services.features: ["Python for AI/ML - TensorFlow, PyTorch", "Deep Learning & Neural Networks", "Natural Language Processing", "Computer Vision", "MLOps & Model Deployment", "Generative AI & Prompt Engineering"]

services.name: Microsoft Power Platform
services.description: Build powerful business applications with SharePoint, Power Automate, Power Apps, Power BI, and Dataverse.
services.features: ["Power Apps Development", "Power Automate Workflows", "Power BI Analytics", "SharePoint Integration", "Dataverse Management", "Microsoft Certification Prep"]

services.name: Cybersecurity
services.description: Protect digital systems with training in network security, ethical hacking, cryptography, and incident response.
services.features: ["Network Security Fundamentals", "Ethical Hacking Techniques", "Cryptography & Encryption", "Incident Response", "Security Auditing", "CISSP/CISM Preparation"]

settings.value: Empowering students through quality education in Data Analytics, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, and Research Support.

faqs.question: What courses do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer Data Analytics, Research Support, AI & Machine Learning, Microsoft Power Platform, and Cybersecurity training programs.

faqs.question: How long are the courses?
faqs.answer: Course durations range from 30-40 hours depending on the program. Each course includes hands-on projects and real-world case studies.

faqs.question: Do you provide certificates?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our courses include industry-recognized certificates upon successful completion.

faqs.question: Can I book a free consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can contact us to schedule a free consultation with our team to discuss your learning goals.

faqs.question: What is the refund policy?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your booking up to 24 hours before the scheduled session for a full refund.

faqs.question: How do I book a session?
faqs.answer: You can browse our teachers and services, add to cart, and proceed to checkout to book a session.

policies.title: Terms of Service
policies.content:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using SOLI MICROLINK's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

2. Description of Services

SOLI MICROLINK provides online training programs in Data Analytics, Research Support, AI & ML, Microsoft Power Platform, and Cybersecurity.

3. User Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.

4. Payment Terms

All payments for services are due at the time of booking. We accept major credit cards and other payment methods as indicated on our platform.

5. Cancellation and Refund Policy

Cancellations made at least 24 hours before the scheduled session are eligible for a full refund. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the session may be subject to a cancellation fee.

6. Intellectual Property

All course materials, content, and resources provided by SOLI MICROLINK are protected by copyright and may not be reproduced or distributed without permission.

7. Limitation of Liability

SOLI MICROLINK shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of our services.

8. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

9. Contact Information

For questions about these Terms, please contact us at info@soli-microlink.com

policies.title: Privacy Policy
policies.content:
1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, and payment information when you register for courses or book sessions.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to process your transactions.

3. Information Sharing

We do not share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to provide our services, comply with the law, or protect our rights.

4. Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our website and to analyze usage patterns.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also object to or restrict certain processing of your data.

7. Children's Privacy

Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.

9. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@soli-microlink.com

policies.title: Refund Policy
policies.content:
1. Course and Session Refunds

We want you to be satisfied with your learning experience. If you are not completely satisfied with a course or session, you may be eligible for a refund under the conditions below.

2. Cancellation Policy

You may cancel your booking up to 24 hours before the scheduled session for a full refund. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the session may be subject to a 50% cancellation fee.

3. No-Show Policy

If you do not attend a scheduled session without prior cancellation, no refund will be issued for that session.

4. Course Materials Refunds

Digital course materials, once downloaded or accessed, are non-refundable.

5. Technical Issues

If you experience technical issues that prevent you from accessing a session or course, please contact us immediately. We will work to resolve the issue or provide a refund if we cannot.

6. Subscription Services

For subscription-based services, you may cancel your subscription at any time. Refunds for partial months are not provided.

7. How to Request a Refund

To request a refund, please contact us at refunds@soli-microlink.com with your booking number and reason for the refund request.

8. Processing Time

Refunds are typically processed within 5-7 business days after approval. The time it takes for the refund to appear in your account may vary depending on your payment provider.

9. Disputes

If you have a dispute regarding a charge, please contact us first so we can attempt to resolve the issue directly.

about_us.title: None
about_us.content: SOLI MICROLINK is a premier educational platform dedicated to empowering students and professionals through high-quality training in data analytics, research support, and expert tutoring.
about_us.mission: Our mission is to empower individuals and organizations with practical, industry-relevant IT skills. We aim to provide high-quality, hands-on training that prepares learners for real-world challenges and career success.
about_us.vision: Our vision is to become a trusted leader in IT education by delivering innovative, accessible, and impactful training programs that help people grow, transform their careers, and succeed in the digital world.
about_us.owner_quote: Empowering the next generation of African innovators through quality education and research support.

reviews.comment: Excellent program! The instructors were very knowledgeable and the hands-on projects were invaluable. Highly recommend SOLI MICROLINK!
The AI & ML course transformed my career. The curriculum is up-to-date and the projects are relevant. Highly recommend!
Great content and flexible scheduling. The support team is very responsive. Would definitely take more courses here.
